title: All the EVAs status as of 222
display_title: All the EVAs status as of 222
wikitext:
[]: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by Ricky O » Sat Jul 16, 2011 4:26 pm For clarity's sake. I'm probably wrong about a few of these, so corrections are welcome. Unit 00: KIA (eaten by Zeruel) Unit 01: Awakened(?) / FUBAR(?) after fusing with Zeruel fused with Rei whatever but impaled but Kaworu's MARK 06 spear. Same as EoE 01 (?). Unit 02: FUBAR , Za Beast'd. Probably not out for the count, I would surmise, however after ditching its "humanity," will EVA 02 start to geek out ala post TV 01, after Zeruel? Unit 03: KIA (Bardiel, taken out by Dummy 01) Unit 04: KIA (asplode, but why exactly?) Unit 05: KIA (Self-Destructed fighting Tunniel) MARK 06: A-OK! (btw why MARK-06? Why not just Unit 06?) Unit 07: ? Unrevealed Unit 08: edit: PREGNANT (FUBAR) EVA Series: Maybe? STAND ALONE: Preparing its comeback (joek)

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 16, 2011 5:10 pm Ricky O wrote: Unit 01: Awakened(?) / FUBAR(?) after fusing with Zeruel fused with Rei whatever but impaled but Kaworu's MARK 06 spear. Same as EoE 01 (?).

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by Ricky O » Sat Jul 16, 2011 5:12 pm Azathoth wrote: Revealed, and pregnant no less.

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 16, 2011 5:43 pm Ricky O wrote: Wait, where was this?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat Jul 16, 2011 6:43 pm Well, it actually states that EVA-08 is "brought to life". So it might be the child of whoever is pregnant in Q.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 16, 2011 7:06 pm The translation I'm working with describes it as "the quickening Eva-08", which would vaguely suggest that Eva-08 is the mother, rather than the fetus.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 16, 2011 7:33 pm Funimation's translation (which comes across as they either had no idea what "quickening" means or didn't want to go there!) regarding Eva-08 was discussed starting here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=444961#444961

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Sat Jul 16, 2011 9:09 pm Ricky O wrote: Unit 04: KIA (asplode, but why exactly?)

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Jul 16, 2011 9:26 pm JoeD80 wrote: Underbidding contractor.

[]: Re: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Jul 17, 2011 6:51 am Ricky O wrote: Unit 04: KIA (asplode, but why exactly?)

[]:             Quote Post by Archaiel » Sun Jul 17, 2011 3:09 pm Correct me if I'm wrong, but doesn't quickening allude to the first movements of a child/fetus or something like that?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Jul 17, 2011 4:45 pm The first movement as felt by the mother, yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Wed Jul 20, 2011 1:48 am Pardon my ignorance, but wasn't the destruction of the American base an accident in the original series? Something that wasn't in SEELE's plan, as mentioned by Gendo/Fuyutsuki? Or am I thinking of the destruction of Unit 03? In any case, does this change (if it is a change) have any story significance?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jul 20, 2011 2:16 am There's no proof, but some characters theorized that SEELE deliberately sabotaged the S2 Engine in the original series, causing the incident so as to prevent the birth of a godlike Evangelion. Strangely, it seems they want the exact opposite in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:06 am SEELE, Where are my MPE's?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Fri Aug 05, 2011 2:06 pm Ricky O wrote: Unit 03: KIA (Bardiel, taken out by Dummy 01)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 05, 2011 2:54 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: SEELE, Where are my MPE's?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 05, 2011 4:56 pm Reichu wrote: The opportunities for yet more action figures are too good to pass up. Evangelion 3.0: Eva-02: Under Repairs Version! Evangelion 3.0: Eva-02: Upgraded Version!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 05, 2011 9:10 pm Reichu wrote: The opportunities for yet more action figures are too good to pass up.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 05, 2011 9:14 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I don't know... they even passed up the opportunity of selling two Eva-00s like in NGE
summary: []: All the EVA's status as of 2.22             Quote Post by Ricky O » Sat Jul 16, 2011 4:26 pm For clarity's sake. I'm probably wrong about a few of these, so corrections are welcome. Unit 00: KIA (eaten by Zeruel) Unit 01: Awakened(?) / FUBAR(?) after fusing with Zeruel fused with Rei whatever but impaled but Kaworu's MARK 06 spear. Same as EoE 01 (?).
